name: Example Provider Adapter
scope: Replace this with the exact tool or provider surface and the usage or quota data it reports.
manualChecks: Replace this with one reproducible manual verification step for Windows and macOS.
privacyBoundary: Reports only usage and quota metadata; does not collect prompts, completions, source files, API keys, cookies, or local tokens.
performanceBoundary: Uses short timeouts, bounded queues, provider cache windows, and no watchdog or tight polling loop.
disablePath: Replace this with the setting, extension toggle, or uninstall path that disables the adapter.
